title: LivelierPokemon
description:
Side mod for Cobblemon.
Integrates Pokemon and Pokemon abilities into the world of Minecraft!
body:
Adds unique Pokemon attributes/characteristics to your Minecraft world!

Some features include:
- Local weather system
- Craftable Golurk with Chiseled Polished Black Tumblestone
- Creepers running from cat Pokemon
- Certain Pokemon giving you buffs when sent out
- Pokemon with Aftermath exploding on death
- And many more!


Join the Cobblemon Discord server to make suggestions and give feedback!
